checks.check: tool runs cleanly with no network, credential, or database access
checks.method: the acceptance test ran in a temp dir with a scrubbed environment — no network/credentials were reachable

checks.check: no outputs hardcoded for specific inputs
checks.method: an automated check cannot confirm general correctness; a reviewer must read the generated code

excluded_inputs_leak_check.method: exact-substring over the generated code and the test output; marker-only records carry no content in this packet, so a clean result also confirms none was fabricated

boundary: reviewer-findings record what the automated checks saw. Items marked needs-human-review are not yet judged. This does not certify or approve the build.
